title: 2025-12-09 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.57
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-12-09: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.57/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-12-09, the score printed 16.57/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
